text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm off today, and while I'm looking<n>for a place
to sit and eat in the early<n>afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice a curious-looking notebook<n>under one of
the seats.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Found it! El's Strongest<n>Notebook in the
World—Número<n>Cuatro!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness! I've been looking<n>everywhere
for it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So it was here all along, huh? I musta<n>dropped it
while I was eating my<n>super ultra spicy sandwich
earlier...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! Muchas gracias for picking it<n>up! I can't
thank you enough, no<n>matter how many
languages I use!
choice_data_list: That notebook must be really important to you.
That notebook must be really important to you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! When my papa was a wrestler, he<n>used to
write down new moves in a<n>notebook just like
this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In other words, that notebook is filled<n>with all the
tricks I've discovered for<n>running and other
special info—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I'll tell ya one of the<n>secrets in this
notebook as my way of<n>thanking you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I recommend the "El-Style Power<n>Training
Program" or "Tips for Race<n>Running on a Clear
Day"! What'll it<n>be?!
choice_data_list: Tips for Race Running on a Clear Day.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yooooou got it! Consider yourself<n>guaranteed to
explode with power!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now lend me your ears! This is<n>confidential stuff,
y'know!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So this is what you gotta do!Whisper, whisper, whisper...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Going for the fair-weather<n>offense tricks,
huh? An excellent<n>choice, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now lend me your ears! This is<n>confidential stuff,
y'know!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So this is what you gotta do!Whisper, whisper, whisper...
